ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the neighborhood */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the neighborhood is located */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the neighborhood */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the neighborhood */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (population per square kilometer) */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the neighborhood was officially established */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the neighborhood data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the neighborhood */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the population */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Number of households in the neighborhood */,
  "median_household_size" REAL /* Median household size */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Number of male residents */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Number of female residents */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object containing age distribution in different age groups */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object containing distribution of different ethnicities */,
  "education_level_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object containing distribution of education levels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socio_economic" (
  "socio_economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socio-economic record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the neighborhood */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of residents */,
  "housing_price" REAL /* Average housing price in the neighborhood */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the neighborhood */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the neighborhood */,
  "employment_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object containing distribution of employment sectors */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of residents */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object containing distribution of income levels */,
  "housing_type_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object containing distribution of housing types */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("socio_economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socio_economic_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infrastructure" (
  "infrastructure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infrastructure record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "infrastructure_type" TEXT /* Type of infrastructure (e.g., park, school, hospital) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the infrastructure */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the infrastructure */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the infrastructure */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* JSON object containing opening hours */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* JSON array containing a list of amenities */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the infrastructure */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Last date when the infrastructure was inspected */,
  "inspection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of inspections */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("infrastructure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infrastructure_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_engagement" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community event */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., community meeting, festival) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback collected from the event */,
  "organizers" TEXT /* JSON array containing information about the organizers of the event */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* JSON array containing information about the sponsors of the event */,
  "media_coverage" TEXT /* JSON object containing media coverage details */,
  "public_response" TEXT /* JSON object containing public response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_engagement_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical record */,
  "development_project" TEXT /* Details of development projects in the neighborhood */,
  "demographic_changes" TEXT /* Summary of demographic changes */,
  "socio_economic_changes" TEXT /* Summary of socio-economic changes */,
  "project_cost" REAL /* Cost of the development project */,
  "project_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the development project in months */,
  "project_impact" TEXT /* JSON object containing the impact of the project */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., demographic, socio-economic, infrastructure) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)
